nodes.label: D&D 5e Latest-Printing-Wins Baseline
nodes.rationale: Official 5e content, most recent printing wins (2024 PHB supersedes 2014; TCE optional features are 2014-only). Whitelisted sources with per-book partial allowances; no UA/partnered content.

nodes.label: Leyfarer Rank (parallel progression)
nodes.rationale: Ranks 0-5 (Prospect/Initiate/Adept/Mentor/Advisor/Director), not tied to class level; auto-promotion at end of first two chapters; perk table in the PDF is layout-garbled.

nodes.label: Leyfarer Focus (Explorer/Naturalist/Scholar)
nodes.rationale: Chosen at Adept rank; grants a focus-specific skill proficiency and ritual spell.

nodes.label: Leyfarer's Journal (item)
nodes.rationale: Wondrous uncommon, auto-granted; write a question, answer in 10 min; uses per long rest = Leyfarer rank.

nodes.label: Leyfarer's Emblem (item)
nodes.rationale: Wondrous common, auto-granted; required material component/focus for rank-based spells and abilities.

nodes.label: Species Optional-Trait System (choose 3)
nodes.rationale: Each TLC species = fixed base traits + choose 3 from a per-species optional pool; some pools contain a Lineage trait with sub-options; some traits grant free traits that don't count against the 3.

nodes.label: Mixed Ancestry (Origin feat)
nodes.rationale: Two non-fabricated Ruvinar species; 4 optional traits total across both pools; same-named non-optional traits pick one (lowest Speed).

nodes.label: Creature-Type Interaction Tags
nodes.rationale: Boolean tags widening targeting: Wilderfolk (beast), Dreamtouched (fey), Biomechanical (humanoid), Nephilim (celestial), Shedim (fiend), Dragonborn (dragon).

nodes.label: Content Unlock Gating
nodes.rationale: Every campaign option stamped: none / Chapter N / Reputation / Special / Little Leyfarers. Needs an unlock_source field per row and a campaign-progress switch.

nodes.label: Session-Based Leveling + XP Banking
nodes.rationale: PCs start at level 3; level = f(session number), capped by campaign chapter (ch8->12 ... ch16->20); extra XP transfers to alternate/future characters; fixed HP at level-up.

nodes.label: Subclass Resource Pools
nodes.rationale: The 12 homebrew archetypes each carry counters the sheet must track (Sunshards, runes, Divine Code points, Lucky Number, Vial of Sand, Focus Points, Dumb Luck, Ghost Shroud, Hedge Your Bets).

nodes.label: Sunshards (Sunforge Artificer)
nodes.rationale: Synthesized magitech power crystals with charges + attached infusion; expire next long rest; also a 500+ GP spell component. Model as item with charges, expires_on_long_rest, infusion.

nodes.label: Runes (Rune Priest)
nodes.rationale: Runes per LR = floor(cleric/2)+PB; 6 rune types + Rune of Destruction; per-creature carry limits; at 17 each rune activates twice.

nodes.label: Divine Code Points (Technomancer)
nodes.rationale: Pool = floor(wizard/2)+PB, regen on LR; plus 1/LR free re-cast; also powers the Summon Divine Machine construct's own pool.

nodes.label: Lucky Number (Gambler Rogue)
nodes.rationale: d20 rolled each LR, stored value; rolling it on weapon attacks = crit; needs a per-character stored-value resource.

nodes.label: Vial of Sand (Mirage Sorcerer)
nodes.rationale: -10 speed while carried; two any-class cantrips; d6 per LR -> stored ability score that gets +1d4 on saves.

nodes.label: Banned Spells (8)
nodes.rationale: Cannot be learned or prepared: Demiplane, Dream of the Blue Veil, Earthquake, Fabricate, Plane Shift, Teleport, Tsunami, Wind Walk. Theme: no teleporting/plane-hopping/terraforming.

nodes.label: Lady of Ivory <-> Fabricate Ban Conflict
nodes.rationale: Warlock 'Lady of Ivory' grants Fabricate as an always-prepared patron spell at level 4, directly conflicting with the ban; needs an in-app ruling/flag.

nodes.label: Human Greenhorn (multiclass bypass)
nodes.rationale: Humans ignore multiclassing ability prerequisites; the multiclass validator must special-case this.

nodes.label: 17 TLC Species
nodes.rationale: ~110 traits; Birdfolk, Catfolk, Dwarf, Elf, Fabricated, Frogfolk, Gnome, Human, Hyenafolk, Kobold, Lizardfolk, Nereid, Orc, Otterfolk, Ratfolk, Snailfolk, Turtlefolk. Same-named TLC species are distinct from official ones for prerequisites.

nodes.label: 12 Homebrew Subclasses
nodes.rationale: One archetype per class: Sunforge, Path of the Primordial, College of Calamity, Rune Priest, Frog Knight, Way of the Twisting Hand, Oath of the Ivory Knight, Ghostscale Reaver, Gambler, Mirage, The Lady of Ivory, Technomancer.

nodes.label: Homebrew Feats (Origin + General)
nodes.rationale: 5 Origin feats (Celestial/Divine/Draconic/Infernal Ancestry, Mixed Ancestry) + 8 General feats; several are repeatable, gated, or carry embedded choices.

nodes.label: Homebrew Spells (8)
nodes.rationale: Appendix S: Bronwyn's Words of Affirmation, Fiendish Brand, Final Breath, Helping Hands, Summon Divine Machine, Squeeb's Shellward, Squeeb's Tenacious Tendrils, Wrath of the Tempest; each unlock-gated.

nodes.label: Draconic Patrons (7)
nodes.rationale: Lookup table (name/clan/scale color/damage type/save) referenced by Kobold Sovereign lineage and Draconic Ancestry feat gifts.

nodes.label: TLC Languages
nodes.rationale: Ethnolect/Regional/Rare categories replacing the stock language list; regional and rare table language<->speaker alignment is skewed in extraction and must be verified against the rendered PDF.

nodes.label: Point-Buy Ability Generation
nodes.rationale: Point buy only (PH p.38) plus 8 preset sample arrays; the only allowed ability-generation method.

nodes.label: TLC Darkvision / Dwarf Tremorsense
nodes.rationale: TLC darkvision reworded (one degree brighter, muted colors); Dwarves get Tremorsense 30 ft instead of darkvision. Sheet must support Tremorsense and conditional Blindsight alongside darkvision.

nodes.label: Nonstandard AC Formulas
nodes.rationale: 13+Dex (Pebbly Skin/Busaya/Voranos), 13+Con no-armor (Turtlefolk), Con-for-Dex, permanent handless shield (Molluscan Aegis), integrated armor (Fabricated).

nodes.label: Hit Dice as Currency
nodes.rationale: Recurring homebrew pattern (Self-Repair, Fire From Dust, Written in Blood, Adaptive Mycelia, Withered Might, limb regrowth) - HD spendable outside rests; needs a general HD-spend action.

nodes.label: Fixed HP at Level-Up
nodes.rationale: Fixed per-class HP values mandatory at level-up; no rolling.
